message:
feat: Port daachorse Aho-Corasick to Zig (complete double-array)

FULL PORT of daachorse double-array Aho-Corasick:

1. State structure (base, check, fail, output_pos)
2. NFA construction (trie + failure links via BFS)
3. Double-array arrangement (XOR-based addressing)
4. Base value allocation (conflict-free via vacantIter)
5. Longest-match search with failure link fallback

Based on: github.com/daac-tools/daachorse

Next: Integrate into tokenizer for fast vocab lookup
